name: mdhumanviewer
description: Read a group of related Markdown files and assemble one self-contained, strongly human-readable HTML overview of the system as a whole. View, not storage: regenerates on demand from the current source .md, never modifies the sources. S0-S5 pipeline: Preflight -> Parse (deterministic Python) -> Render (N parallel agents) -> Verify (N parallel agents) -> Cross-file -> Assemble (deterministic Python) -> Report. Read-once / fully-parallel guarantee: each source enters an LLM context exactly twice (render + verify), both fully parallel, with zero serial whole-corpus generation passes; discovery, structure, graph, page assembly, and all fidelity gates run in stdlib Python off the LLM hot path.
